task_description: Nexus Analytics received 10 bug reports this week. As PM, assign a priority (P0=Critical/fix now, P1=This sprint, P2=Next sprint, P3=Backlog) to every bug. You have 20 steps. Use 'prioritize' actions on each item, then 'submit' to finalize.

context.quarter_goal: Reduce churn among enterprise customers by 15%
context.note: P0 items trigger immediate on-call pages. P1 items are committed this sprint. Triage must be accurate — wrong priorities erode team trust.

items.title: Dashboard crashes on export for enterprise accounts > 1M rows
items.description: Users on enterprise plans with datasets larger than 1M rows get an unhandled exception when clicking 'Export to CSV'. Error: OOM in data serialization layer. Affects all export formats.

items.title: Free tier users see 'Upgrade' button in wrong locale (zh-CN)
items.description: The upgrade CTA button shows English text 'Upgrade Now' instead of Chinese for zh-CN locale users on the free tier plan page. Visual bug, no functional impact.

items.title: SSO login fails for Okta integrations when MFA is enforced
items.description: Enterprise customers using Okta SSO with MFA enforcement are unable to log in. Auth token exchange fails silently and users are redirected to homepage. Affects all Okta-based enterprise customers.

items.title: Tooltip z-index overlaps modal on Safari 17
items.description: In Safari 17+, chart tooltips render above modal dialogs when a modal is open, causing visual overlap. No data loss, no functional regression. Reproducible only on macOS Safari 17.

items.title: Scheduled reports not delivered if recipient email has + alias
items.description: Scheduled PDF/CSV reports fail silently when the recipient email contains a + alias (e.g., user+reports@company.com). Email validation regex incorrectly rejects valid RFC 5321 addresses.

items.title: API rate limiter returns 429 for valid requests under documented limit
items.description: The public API rate limiter is misconfigured and triggers 429 Too Many Requests for customers sending fewer than the documented 1000 req/min. Root cause: sliding window bug in Redis counter resets. Developer customers are filing complaints and threatening to churn.

items.title: Dark mode color contrast fails WCAG AA on secondary buttons
items.description: In dark mode, secondary action buttons (#6B7280 on #1F2937) have a contrast ratio of 3.1:1, below the WCAG AA minimum of 4.5:1. Affects accessibility compliance.

items.title: Data pipeline ingestion silently drops rows with null timestamps
items.description: The ETL pipeline silently discards rows where the timestamp field is null rather than raising an error or substituting a default. Enterprise customers running compliance reports notice missing records weeks later. No visibility into data loss.

items.title: Onboarding checklist UI shows 100% complete when 3 steps remain
items.description: The onboarding progress checklist incorrectly calculates completion and shows 100% before all steps are done. New users think they're done but haven't connected a data source or set up their first dashboard.

items.title: Billing page throws 500 error when promo code field is left blank
items.description: On the subscription upgrade page, leaving the promo code field empty and clicking 'Apply' causes a 500 internal server error. The field should be optional. No charge occurs but user sees a generic error and often abandons checkout.
